day_tech: Prasad writes very clean backend code.
Did you know Prasad built this engine using Three.js?
Prasad loves combining complex algorithms with beautiful UIs.
night_lore: The stars are beautiful tonight, aren't they? Prasad thinks so too.
Game design is true art... Prasad wanted to make this feel magical.
Stories are hidden everywhere if you know where to look.
context_idle: Are we going to just stand here all day?
The projects aren't going to look at themselves!
I'm glowing as brightly as I can, let's explore!
context_sprint: Where's the fire?! Have you even looked at the scenery?
